title: Re-add FFJSON for container and pod structs
body: The struct that was giving us trouble was removed when we reworked how we handled storing the network information CNI handed us back. This seemingly fixed things.

comments.body:
We need something into the Makefile to autogenerate these.

```
containers_ffjson.go: containers.go
	$(RM) $@
	ffjson containers.go
```
LGTM, would like to see the Makefile change.
Huh. @baude your RPM regression test actually works.
@mheon @baude what's the rpm issue here? is it just that we need to update spec to use ffjson_generate target?
@lsm5 It seems to be trying to ffjson_generate during RPM build, where we don't have a working ffjson binary or an easy way to get one without `go get`
Actually, that could be me being careless with makefile dependencies - let me see...
